'''Gbu''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], located in the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster's]] [[Keldrath sector/Legends|Keldrath sector]].

==Description==
It was in relative proximity to [[Crseih Station]] and [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]].<ref name="TCS" />

Gbu's high-[[Gravity/Legends|gravity]] [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] made Gbu uninhabitable to any species unadapted to such an environment.<ref name="TCS" /> The planet was home to the [[Veubg]]ri, an [[Insectoid/Legends|insectoid]] [[Species/Legends|species]] species prized as valuable laborers able to work in highly pressurized atmospheres.<ref name="Xim Week" />

==History==
Discovered during the expansion of [[Xim's empire|Xim's Empire]] circa [[25,100 BBY]], [[Mullan]] was gathered into the [[Keldrath Alignment]] nearly a century after [[Xim/Legends|Xim's]] death. It was eventually part of the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]] when the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]] joined the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]].<ref name="Xim Week" />

In the Republic's final years, the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]] worlds joined the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] and were later members of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Gbu and the Keldrath sector were carved out of the Hegemony by the Empire.<ref name="Xim Week" />

In [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]], Gbu was visited by [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], shortly before her children were captured on [[Munto Codru/Legends|Munto Codru]] by agents of [[Hethrir]]. During the visit to Gbu, the New Republic delegation was forced to meet with their Veubgri counterparts on a satellite due to the intense high gravity pressure.<ref name="TCS" />

*''[[The Crystal Star]]''
